description: Failure scenario - context-length error then rate-limit, exponential backoff retry, fallback agent invoked, ultimately fails after 3 attempts with diagnostic guidance

payload.input: Summarize this 240-page financial filing PDF into a 500-word executive memo highlighting risks, capex, and forward guidance: s3://acme-docs/Q4-2025-10K-Acme-Corp.pdf (8.4 MB, 240 pages, ~168K extracted tokens).

payload.purpose: first attempt - summarize full document in single context window

payload.output: ERROR: context_length_exceeded. Input tokens 168,420 exceeded model context limit 128,000. Document is too large for single-pass summarization. Attempting retry with map-reduce chunking strategy.

payload.purpose: second attempt - map-reduce: chunk document into 8 sections, summarize each

payload.output: PARTIAL SUCCESS then ERROR: rate_limit_exceeded. Successfully processed 6 of 8 chunks (~$0.84 spent). On chunk 7, hit Tier 1 rate limit (10K tokens/min on this account, 42K already consumed in this minute). Backing off 4.2 seconds before final attempt. Note: account is rate-limit constrained - escalating to fallback-summarizer with smaller-model strategy.

payload.reason: Primary agent hit rate limit on a tier-constrained account - fallback uses gpt-4o-mini which has higher rate limits and lower cost, can complete the remaining 2 chunks plus reduce phase

payload.purpose: complete remaining 2 chunks with smaller model

payload.output: Successfully summarized chunks 7 and 8 with gpt-4o-mini. All 8 chunk summaries now in hand (~14,000 tokens combined). Proceeding to reduce phase to compose final 500-word executive memo.

payload.purpose: reduce phase - synthesize 8 chunk summaries into final 500-word memo

payload.output: ERROR: rate_limit_exceeded AGAIN. Reduce phase requires 14K tokens at once, account is now in throttle window from cumulative usage. Waited 30s, retried, throttled again. RECOMMENDATION TO USER: this account is on Tier 1 rate limits which are insufficient for a 240-page document workflow even with chunking. Three paths forward: (1) upgrade to Tier 2 ($50 paid + 7 days from first success - 24h wait) or higher to raise the rate ceiling, (2) split this job across 2 hours with explicit 5-minute pacing between chunks, (3) use the offline batch API which has separate rate limits and is 50% cheaper but takes up to 24h. Job has been paused with checkpoint ckpt-2026-0414-7714 - the 8 chunk summaries are saved and can resume from reduce phase once rate ceiling is raised.

payload.resolution: FAILED after 3 attempts and fallback escalation - root cause is account rate-limit tier insufficient for document size, not a model or code defect. Checkpoint saved with 8 chunk summaries; user has 3 actionable recovery paths. Demonstrates: graceful degradation, error classification, fallback agent handoff, and actionable failure messaging.
